zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice Sackville於大約1095年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可素德波利時，她的父親Guillaume de Sauqueville54歲，母親Albreda de Tregoz28歲。她和William de Glanville Lord of Bromholm至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1195年在英國享年101歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice Sackville于大约1095年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可素德波利时，她的父亲Guillaume de Sauqueville54岁，母亲Albreda de Tregoz28岁。她和William de Glanville Lord of Bromholm至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1195年在英国享年101岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sackville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Sauqueville (Seine-Maritime) or Sacquenville (Eure).

variants.name: Sackwild
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a Yiddish form sakwild, apparently meaning something like ‘game(bird), or venison, in a bag’.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice Sackville was born about 1095, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Guillaume de Sauqueville, was 54 and her mother, Albreda de Tregoz, was 28. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with William de Glanville Lord of Bromholm. She died in 1195, in England, at the age of 101.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice Sackville est née environ 1095, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Guillaume de Sauqueville, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Albreda de Tregoz, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec William de Glanville Lord of Bromholm. Elle est décédée en 1195, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 101 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice Sackville um 1095 in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Sauqueville 54 und ihre Mutter Albreda de Tregoz 28. Sie hatte mit William de Glanville Lord of Bromholm mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1195 im Alter von 101 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice Sackville è nata il circa 1095 nel Sudbury, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Guillaume de Sauqueville, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Albreda de Tregoz, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con William de Glanville Lord of Bromholm. Morì nel 1195, nel England, all'età di 101 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice Sackvilleが約1095年にイギリスイギリススフォルクスドブリーで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Sauquevilleは54歳，母Albreda de Tregozは28歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Glanville Lord of Bromholmとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1195年にイギリスで101歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice Sackville(이)가 대략 1095년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 수드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Sauqueville(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Albreda de Tregoz(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 William de Glanville Lord of Bromholm(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1195년 영국에서 101세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice Sackville nasceu aproximadamente 1095, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Guillaume de Sauqueville, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Albreda de Tregoz, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com William de Glanville Lord of Bromholm. Ela faleceu em 1195, em Inglaterra, com 101 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice Sackville родилась около 1095 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Sauqueville было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Albreda de Tregoz, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от William de Glanville Lord of Bromholm. Она умерла в 1195 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 101 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice Sackville nació aproximadamente 1095, en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Guillaume de Sauqueville, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Albreda de Tregoz, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con William de Glanville Lord of Bromholm. Murió en 1195, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 101 años.
